tasks.subject: T0: Add _verify_bind_mount helper + 3 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New CrawlerManager._verify_bind_mount(path, label) method raising 503 BIND_MOUNT_MISSING when os.path.ismount(path) is False. 3 helper unit tests in test_crawler_manager.py::TestVerifyBindMount. No call sites yet.

**Files:**
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestVerifyBindMount -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestVerifyBindMount -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Method _verify_bind_mount exists on CrawlerManager","Raises 503 BIND_MOUNT_MISSING when ismount False","Returns None when ismount True","Detail dict has exact 5 keys (error_code, path, label, ops_action, hint)","3 unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T1: Wire _verify_bind_mount into stash_crawl + autouse fixture + 503 test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** stash_crawl calls _verify_bind_mount(STASH_SHARED_PATH, 'stash upload') after TOCTOU. Add autouse mock_bind_mounts_present fixture. 1 integration test.

**Files:**
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["stash_crawl calls _verify_bind_mount after TOCTOU","Autouse fixture mock_bind_mounts_present added","New test test_stash_crawl_rejects_when_stash_dir_not_mount asserts 503 + lock release","All previous stash tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T2: Wire _verify_bind_mount into unstash_crawl (2 sites) + 503 test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** unstash_crawl calls _verify_bind_mount twice (STASH_DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH 'unstash requests', STASH_DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH 'unstash results') after TOCTOU. 1 integration test.

**Files:**
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["unstash_crawl calls _verify_bind_mount twice after TOCTOU","First call label is 'unstash requests'","Second call label is 'unstash results'","New test asserts 503 + lock release","All previous tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: T3: Replace _delete_local with _cleanup_data_keep_logs + update tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Swap stash_crawl shutil.rmtree for os.walk bottom-up keep-logs cleanup mirroring archive_crawl. Update base_job_info fixture (add crawler.log). Rename + adjust existing test. Add new test_stash_keeps_logs_and_markers_on_cleanup.

**Files:**
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["_cleanup_data_keep_logs replaces _delete_local","files_to_keep matches archive_crawl exactly","crawler.log + completion_marker.json kept","data files deleted","empty subdirs rmdir'd","root dir kept","Existing test renamed + assertions updated","New test_stash_keeps_logs_and_markers_on_cleanup passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: T4: Append runbook sections to daemon_guide.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two new sections at end of docs/daemon_guide.md: 'Troubleshooting: 503 BIND_MOUNT_MISSING' + 'Recovery: stash tars trapped in pre-fix ephemeral container'.

**Files:**
- docs/daemon_guide.md

**Verify:** `grep -c 'BIND_MOUNT_MISSING' docs/daemon_guide.md`

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/daemon_guide.md"],"verifyCommand":"grep -c 'BIND_MOUNT_MISSING' docs/daemon_guide.md","acceptanceCriteria":["Section 'Troubleshooting: 503 BIND_MOUNT_MISSING' present","Section 'Recovery: stash tars trapped in pre-fix ephemeral container' present","Both contain verifiable bash commands","grep matches ≥1 for each section"]}
```
